import io
import string
import list

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut buf = ""
let n = string.len(line1)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line1, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(buf)
      match string.parse_int(buf)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      buf = ""
    end
  else
    buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(buf)
  match string.parse_int(buf)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut filtered: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  if x > t
    filtered = list.push(filtered, x)
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in filtered
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end

println(out)
